results.title: HUNTER X HUNTER THE STAGE 3
results.original_title: 『HUNTER×HUNTER』THE STAGE 3
results.overview: In pursuit of clues to find his father, Ging, Gon sets his sights on the legendary Hunter-exclusive video game, Greed Island. Together with Killua, he heads to Yorknew City to bid for it at the world's greatest auction.  After a costly conflict with the Phantom Troupe leaves them bankrupt on auction day, the duo shifts tactics. They join the game as hired players for Battera, the billionaire who purchased every copy.  Inside Greed Island, Gon and Killua clash with skilled participants like Genthru, Tsezguerra, and Goreinu. Their journey takes a decisive turn when they meet Biscuit Krueger, a formidable trainer who puts them through a grueling regimen. As their combat abilities soar, they must confront the game's formidable enemies and unravel its secrets.  The ultimate challenge awaits: Can Gon clear the game and finally meet Ging?

results.title: HUNTER X HUNTER THE STAGE
results.original_title: 『HUNTER×HUNTER』THE STAGE
results.overview: Enchanted by the magic of the word “unknown,” those who pursue its power are known as Hunters.  As a child, Gon learned from Kite—a Hunter who visited Whale Island—that his father, Ging, long believed dead, is not only alive but a legendary Hunter. Now twelve years old, Gon leaves home to take the perilous Hunter Exam, determined to follow in his father's footsteps and meet him at last.  Alongside the companions he meets on his journey—the assassin's son Killua, the vengeance-driven Kurapika, and the aspiring doctor Leorio—Gon confronts extraordinary trials that test his strength, wit, and spirit. This dynamic stage play adaptation brings the iconic "Hunter Exam" and "Zoldyck Family" arcs to life, capturing the adventure, friendship, and high stakes of the beloved series.  The question hangs in the balance: Will Gon succeed in becoming a Hunter?

results.title: Nissy -Documentary Movie- “Re:10th Anniversary Final” BEST DOME TOUR
results.original_title: Nissy -Documentary Movie- “Re:10th Anniversary Final” BEST DOME TOUR
results.overview: A documentary that closely followed the tour production for 1,300 hours. It captures Nissy confronting his “loneliness” at the center of the stage, even while surrounded by numerous audience members and staff.

results.title: Matsu to One
results.original_title: まつとおね
results.overview: In March 2025, "Matsu to One" was performed at the Noto Theater in Nanao City, Ishikawa Prefecture, to pray for the recovery from the Noto Peninsula earthquake. Matsu (Riho Yoshioka), the wife of Toshiie Maeda, whose husband served Nobunaga Oda, and One (Misako Renbutsu), the wife of Hideyoshi Toyotomi, vowed a long-lasting friendship to each other when they were young. However, after Hideyoshi's death, Toshiie soon passed away, and the course of the country's history was pushed forward to the Battle of Sekigahara. Matsu and One were supposed to be bound by a firm friendship, but their bond is unexpectedly shaken in the midst of the conflict.

results.title: Cardcaptor Sakura
results.original_title: カードキャプターさくら
results.overview: Cardcaptor Sakura tells the story of Sakura Kinomoto, a ten-year-old girl who accidentally releases a set of magical cards called Clow Cards. Her job then is to gather all the cards before they cause trouble in the city where she lives.

results.title: I'll Be Deceived
results.original_title: だまされて貰います
results.overview: A con man defrauds a small rural town, sparking an international manhunt.

results.title: Dogs and War: What I saw in Ukraine
results.original_title: 犬と戦争: ウクライナで私が見たこと
results.overview: When Russia invaded in February 2022. Japanese director Akane Yamada travelled to the war zone to document an often-overlooked story - the fate of animals and the people who refuse to abandon them. Known for her work in disaster zones since Fukushima, Yamada witnessed animal welfare groups mobilising at the Polish border to help refugees and their pets, and followed Ukrainians who continued to adopt shelter animals amid the chaos. In Borodianka, near Kyiv, she uncovered the tragic deaths of shelter dogs left behind during occupation. Her three-year investigation led her deep into Ukraine's frontline regions, from flooded Kherson after the Kahkovka Dam's destruction to a children's hospital in Kyiv struck by a missile. Through the stories of people who refuse to abandon animals even amid the devastation of war, this documentary portrays the resilience and dignity of those who refuse to surrender to violence.

results.title: We Will Remember
results.original_title: 戦場にながれる歌
results.overview: Near the end of the war, a number of young Japanese join an army band hoping to avoid the front lines, but instead are sent to the Chinese Front.

results.title: New Tengu Kurama: Samurai in the Pouring Rain
results.original_title: 新鞍馬天狗 夕立の武士
results.overview: Kurama Tengu uncovers a suspicious gold robbery tied to a political scheme within the shogunate. As he follows the clues, hidden alliances, betrayals, and a mysterious woman entangle him in a dangerous conspiracy whose true aim remains just out of reach.

results.title: Return of the Champ
results.original_title: 帰ってきた若大将
results.overview: A not-so-young "Young Guy" (Kayama) returns in this reunion feature, which takes Yuichi and Ishiyama to New York, where the former runs in the New York Marathon and romances TV producer Minagawa. A delightful throwback to Toho's '60s style filmmaking.

results.title: Frame of Snow
results.original_title: 雪の炎
results.overview: During a winter visit to her grandfather’s mountain home, a young saleswoman becomes entangled in love and jealousy among visiting skiers. After heartbreak and tragedy in the snow, she departs renewed, ready to begin again.

results.title: Constellations on Earth, Part One: Earth Chapter
results.original_title: 地上の星座　前篇　地上篇
results.overview: Japanese film from 1934, based on a novel by Itsuma Maki (real name Kaitarō Hasegawa).

results.title: My Love Lies Over the Mountains
results.original_title: 我が愛は山の彼方に
results.overview: Based on Itou Keiichi's novel "Elegy for the Setting Sun".
